headline: Short-term continuation favored while volatility compresses.
subheadline: Live NQ feed blended with NVIDIA QPO scenario optimization and KX distillation backtest conventions.

checks.name: Same-Day Session Window
checks.detail: Next bar 2026-03-30 00:11:25 ET must be within the NQ session window (18:00 -> 16:55 ET pre-close flatten).

execution_plan.notes: Signal is generated on 5m bar close; execute on next 5m bar open to mirror model timing. Intrabar stop-touch exits enforce the $500 active-loss cap, max hold is 90 minutes, and overnight holds are blocked (same-session-day trades only).

QPO overlay: 600 Gaussian scenarios, gaussian fit, top sleeve ES.
PDF trend overlay: 63d momentum -9.87%, bias SHORT.
